creator: dom@happygiraffe.net
text:
This patch updates ports/pcre to the latest version.  It also
	switches to the bz2 distfile.

	Many thanks to Jeremy Norris for supplying this patch.

	NB: This patch DELETES files/patch-aa.  Its functionality is
	subsumed by the NEW files/patch-ltmain.sh.
